title: stachys officinalis
intro: Stachys officinalis, also known as woundwort or betony, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, such as reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and promoting wound healing. Stachys officinalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
